title: VIVAS Act Violence Impact and Vulnerabilities Assessment Study Act
summary: To direct the Comptroller General of the United States to conduct a comprehensive, culturally informed, and community-engaged study of gender-based violence in Puerto Rico, including its causes, prevalence, systemic drivers, and potential policy solutions, taking into account the island's cultural, economic, educational, infrastructural, and post-disaster challenges.

actions.action: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
